zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Piers de Maulay III, of Mulgrave and Doncaster於1249年7月22日出生在英國越可爾姆爾格拉福 卡素時，他的父親Sir Piers Maulay II20歲，母親Joan Brus23歲。他於大約1273年與Nicola de Gaunt結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1308年9月6日在他的家鄉享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Piers de Maulay III, of Mulgrave and Doncaster于1249年7月22日出生在英国越可爾姆爾格拉福 卡素时，他的父亲Sir Piers Maulay II20岁，母亲Joan Brus23岁。他于大约1273年与Nicola de Gaunt结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1308年9月6日在他的家乡享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Maulay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Macaulay  . Compare the Irish form   McAuley  .

variants.name: Macaulay
meanings: Scottish (mainly Ross and Cromarty and Inverness):
from Gaelic Mac Amhalghaidh ‘son of Amhalghadh’, an Old Gaelic personal name of unexplained etymology. Compare the Irish form McAuley , also Manx Kewley , Cowley , and Callow .
from Gaelic Mac Amhlaoibh ‘son of Amhlao(i)bh’, Gaelic form of the Old Norse personal name Óláfr (see Olafsen ). Compare McAuliffe .

nameMeanings.name: Piers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Regular medieval vernacular form of Peter (from the Old French nominative case, as against the oblique Pier, modern Pierre). In the form Pierce it survived into the 18th century, although in part this may be a transferred use of the surname derived from the medieval given name. Piers was revived in the mid-20th century, perhaps partly under the influence of William Langland's great rambling medieval poem Piers Plowman ( 1367–86 ), in which the character of Piers symbolizes the virtues of hard work, honesty, and fairness.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Piers de Maulay III, of Mulgrave and Doncaster was born on 22 July 1249, in Mulgrave Castle, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir Piers Maulay II, was 20 and his mother, Joan Brus, was 23. He married Nicola de Gaunt about 1273. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 6 September 1308, in his hometown, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Piers de Maulay III, of Mulgrave and Doncaster est né le 22 juillet 1249, à Mulgrave Castle, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Piers Maulay II, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Joan Brus, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Nicola de Gaunt environ 1273. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 6 septembre 1308, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Piers de Maulay III, of Mulgrave and Doncaster am 22. Juli 1249 in Mulgrave Castle, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Piers Maulay II 20 und seine Mutter Joan Brus 23. Er hat um 1273 Nicola de Gaunt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 6. September 1308 im Alter von 59 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Piers de Maulay III, of Mulgrave and Doncaster è nato il il 22 luglio 1249 nel Mulgrave Castle, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Piers Maulay II, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Joan Brus, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Nicola de Gaunt circa 1273. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 6 settembre 1308, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Piers de Maulay III, of Mulgrave and Doncasterが1249年7月22日にイギリスヨークシュアイアムルグラブ カストルで生まれた時，父Sir Piers Maulay IIは20歳，母Joan Brusは23歳であった。約1273年にNicola de Gauntと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1308年9月6日に故郷で59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Piers de Maulay III, of Mulgrave and Doncaster(이)가 1249년 7월 22일 영국 요르크실르 뮐그레이브 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Piers Maulay II(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Brus(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1273년 Nicola de Gaunt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1308년 9월 6일 그의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.22 July 1249–6 September 1308: 1249 оны Долоодугаар сарын 22–1308 оны Есдүгээр сарын 6

pt.22 July 1249–6 September 1308: 22 de julho de 1249–6 de setembro de 1308
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Piers de Maulay III, of Mulgrave and Doncaster nasceu em 22 de julho de 1249, em Mulgrave Castle, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Piers Maulay II, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Joan Brus, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Nicola de Gaunt aproximadamente 1273. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 6 de setembro de 1308, em sua cidade natal, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Piers de Maulay III, of Mulgrave and Doncaster родился 22 июля 1249 г. в местности мулграв кастл, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Piers Maulay II было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Brus, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Nicola de Gaunt около 1273 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 6 сентября 1308 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 59 лет.

es.22 July 1249–6 September 1308: 22 de julio de 1249–6 de septiembre de 1308
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Piers de Maulay III, of Mulgrave and Doncaster nació el 22 de julio de 1249, en Mulgrave Castle, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Piers Maulay II, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Joan Brus, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Nicola de Gaunt aproximadamente 1273. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 6 de septiembre de 1308, en su pueblo, a la edad de 59 años.
